content: عَصفور في اليَدّ خَيْرٌ مِن عَشَرَةً عَلى الشَجَرَة

transcriptions.arabizi: Aasfoor fiilyaddachayran min Aashara Aala ilshagara

relationships: eng:A sparrow in the hand is better than ten on the tree
